method.name: loso_annotation_prototype_plus_knowledge_library_barfit
method.nonrepeatable_mix_rule: For barfit, mix actions planned for 3 or more bars are used at most once per song; short mix actions and ietora/activation-style triggers may repeat.
method.leakage_note: The held-out song's recommended_actions are not used for action selection.

steps.name: Audio decode
steps.detail: Load waveform and estimate duration from the uploaded track.

steps.name: Signal features
steps.detail: Use frame energy, onset strength, spectral centroid/flatness, and novelty proxies.

steps.name: Estimated bars
steps.detail: Estimate a regular bar grid from onset peaks and tempo heuristics.

steps.name: Rule labels
steps.detail: Assign coarse music sections and call roles from position, energy, onset, and vocal-density proxy.

steps.name: Action fitting
steps.detail: Use the same barfit action library after the fallback segmentation.

action_selection.note: Held-out song annotation actions are not used for selection.
